name: flareThenFadeBase
description: Identical to flareThenFade but the phase-1 ramp only touches layers 3-5 (ledge + base1 + base2). Phase-2 decay still affects all 6 layers (firmware decay loop is unscoped). Mirrors firmware case 0x03.

tracks._comment: Phase 1 — 25-tick exponential ramp on layers 3-5 only.
Phase 2 — decay all 6 layers (firmware decay is unscoped).
